title: Robust Monitoring of Arc Welding Processes: A Generalizable Framework with DVAE and Particle Filter
authors: Yue Cao, Hai Lin, YuMing Zhang
abstract: Arc welding processes are essential for continuous fabrication but prone to disturbances that impair weld quality, making real-time monitoring critical yet difficult due to complex visual patterns and nonlinear, time-varying dynamics. Deep learning shows promise but faces scalability limits because of its dependence on large labeled datasets and application-specific tuning. We explore whether a unified approach can characterize major arc welding processes across applications and improve scalability through consistent state monitoring. This paper introduces a robust and generalizable monitoring framework for arc welding. It combines unsupervised deep latent representation learning, which extracts compact features from weld pool images, with Bayesian filtering to handle persistent and fluctuating disturbances such as arc radiation and specular reflections. Specifically, a Dynamic Variational Autoencoder (DVAE), consisting of a CNN-based encoder-decoder and an LSTM-based transition model, jointly learns latent representations and their evolution under control inputs. For robust real-time inference, a specialized Particle Filter (PF) propagates the latent and LSTM hidden states, preserving process history while suppressing sensor noise. This design is well suited to welding's slow and inertial dynamics. Validation on GTAW and GMAW without process-specific tuning demonstrates the framework's generalizability and robustness.

infographic.key_insight: A single DVAE + particle filter framework can learn compact weld-pool dynamics and monitor multiple arc welding processes robustly across disturbances and settings.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This offers a scalable path to real-time welding quality monitoring with less reliance on large labeled datasets or process-specific tuning.
method: CNN encoder-decoder learns latent weld-pool features from images
LSTM transition model captures time-evolving latent dynamics under control inputs
Particle filter tracks latent and hidden states for noise-robust inference
infographic.evidence_signal: The framework was validated on GTAW and GMAW and showed generalization without process-specific tuning, according to the abstract.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on the quality of weld-pool imaging and the computational cost of particle filtering for real-time deployment.
infographic.paper_title: Robust Monitoring of Arc Welding Processes: A Generalizable Framework with DVAE and Particle Filter

zh-Hans.title: 具有 DVAE 和粒子滤波器的弧焊过程鲁棒监测：一种可泛化框架
zh-Hans.abstract: 弧焊过程对于连续制造至关重要，但容易受到扰动影响而损害焊缝质量，因此实时监测至关重要；然而，由于复杂的视觉模式以及非线性、时变动力学，这一任务也十分困难。深度学习展现出应用前景，但由于依赖大量标注数据和针对特定应用的调参，其可扩展性受到限制。我们探讨一种统一方法是否能够跨应用表征主要弧焊过程，并通过一致的状态监测提升可扩展性。本文提出一种用于弧焊的鲁棒且可泛化监测框架。该框架将无监督深度潜在表示学习与贝叶斯滤波相结合：前者从熔池图像中提取紧凑特征，后者用于处理如电弧辐射和镜面反射等持续性和波动性扰动。具体而言，动态变分自编码器（DVAE）由基于 CNN 的编码器-解码器和基于 LSTM 的转移模型组成，可联合学习潜在表示及其在控制输入作用下的演化。为实现鲁棒的实时推断，专门设计的粒子滤波器（PF）同时传播潜在状态和 LSTM 隐状态，在抑制传感器噪声的同时保留过程历史。该设计非常适合焊接过程缓慢且具有惯性的动力学特性。对 GTAW 和 GMAW 的验证且无需针对具体过程调优，表明该框架具有良好的泛化性和鲁棒性。

infographic.key_insight: 单一的 DVAE + 粒子滤波器框架可以学习紧凑的熔池动力学，并在不同扰动和设置下鲁棒地监测多种弧焊过程。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为实时焊接质量监测提供了一条可扩展路径，并减少了对大量标注数据或针对具体过程调参的依赖。
method: CNN 编码器-解码器从图像中学习熔池潜在特征
LSTM 转移模型捕获控制输入作用下随时间演化的潜在动力学
粒子滤波器跟踪潜在状态和隐状态，实现抗噪声推断
infographic.evidence_signal: 根据摘要，该框架在 GTAW 和 GMAW 上进行了验证，并在无需针对具体过程调优的情况下表现出泛化能力。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能取决于熔池成像质量以及粒子滤波用于实时部署的计算成本。

title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior
authors: Sneha Samal, Shrikant Joshi, Stefan Björklund, Mohit Chandra, Akhil Bhardwaj, Jaromír Kopeček
abstract: Depositing various coatings on surface of engineering components with the aim to improve their performance concerning wear, corrosion, friction and thermal protection is already a standard practice. Depositing metallic NiTi shape memory alloy coatings may be a viable alternative for hard ceramic coatings. NiTi coatings offer additional benefits originating from unique functional thermomechanical properties. However, fabrication of thick NiTi coatings turned out to be difficult. Standard electroplating and laser cladding methods are not suitable for NiTi the most widely used plasma spray methods tend to produce chemically inhomogeneous coatings that do not transform martensitically, cold sprayed NiTi coatings suffer from poor adhesion to the substrates. In this work we report on first ever successful fabrication of thick NiTi coatings (100-300 um) that display functional thermomechanical properties and simultaneously show very good adherence to the substrate. We used high velocity air fuel thermal spray method to fabricate NiTi coatings deposited on mild steel using four different sets of processing parameters. Chemical composition, porosity, microstructure, phase transformation and functional thermomechanical properties of the NiTi coatings were evaluated. Although the coatings contain inhomogeneous microstructure, voids, oxide particles, high density of dislocation defects and internal stress, they undergo martensitic transformation upon cooling and or mechanical loading. As sprayed NiTi coatings need to be annealed to display functional thermomechanical properties. Despite their limited tensile strength, the coatings displayed thermal actuation in 3 point bending tests and shape memory effects in nanoindentation and scratch tests.

infographic.key_insight: HVAF spraying can produce thick NiTi coatings that retain martensitic transformation and shape-memory functionality, despite a heterogeneous as-sprayed microstructure.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This offers a practical route to add functional, self-actuating NiTi surfaces to steel components for wear, friction, or thermal-response applications.
method: HVAF spray-deposited NiTi onto mild steel using four process parameter sets.
Characterized composition, porosity, microstructure, and phase transformation behavior.
Assessed functional response with annealing, 3-point bending, nanoindentation, and scratch tests.
infographic.evidence_signal: The coatings were 100–300 µm thick and were shown to transform martensitically and exhibit thermal actuation and shape-memory effects after annealing.
infographic.watch_item: As-sprayed coatings contained voids, oxides, dislocations, and internal stress, so post-spray annealing and property consistency are important concerns.
infographic.paper_title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior

zh-Hans.title: HVAF喷涂NiTi涂层：微观结构、相变与形状记忆行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 在工程部件表面沉积各种涂层以改善其在耐磨、耐腐蚀、减摩和热防护方面的性能，已是一项标准做法。沉积金属NiTi形状记忆合金涂层可能是硬质陶瓷涂层的可行替代方案。NiTi涂层因其独特的功能性热机械性能而具有额外优势。然而，制备厚NiTi涂层被证明是困难的。标准电镀和激光熔覆方法并不适用于NiTi；最广泛使用的等离子喷涂方法往往会产生化学不均匀的涂层，这些涂层不会发生马氏体转变，而冷喷NiTi涂层则存在与基体结合不良的问题。在本工作中，我们报道了首次成功制备出厚NiTi涂层（100-300 um），其不仅表现出功能性热机械性能，同时还与基体具有很好的附着性。我们采用高速度空气燃料热喷涂方法，在低碳钢上使用四组不同的工艺参数制备NiTi涂层。对NiTi涂层的化学组成、孔隙率、微观结构、相变以及功能性热机械性能进行了评估。尽管涂层包含不均匀的微观结构、空洞、氧化物颗粒、高密度位错缺陷和内应力，但其在冷却和/或机械载荷作用下仍发生马氏体转变。喷涂态NiTi涂层需要进行退火才能表现出功能性热机械性能。尽管其拉伸强度有限，涂层仍在三点弯曲试验中表现出热致驱动，并在纳米压痕和划痕试验中表现出形状记忆效应。

infographic.key_insight: HVAF喷涂能够制备出厚NiTi涂层，即使在喷涂态微观结构不均匀的情况下，仍可保留马氏体转变和形状记忆功能。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为在钢构件上引入具有功能性、自驱动特征的NiTi表面提供了一条实用途径，可用于耐磨、减摩或热响应应用。
method: 采用HVAF喷涂工艺，并使用四组工艺参数将NiTi沉积到低碳钢上。
对成分、孔隙率、微观结构和相变行为进行了表征。
通过退火、三点弯曲、纳米压痕和划痕试验评估其功能响应。
infographic.evidence_signal: 涂层厚度为100–300 µm，且在退火后被证明能够发生马氏体转变，并表现出热致驱动和形状记忆效应。
infographic.watch_item: 喷涂态涂层含有空洞、氧化物、位错和内应力，因此喷涂后退火以及性能一致性是需要关注的重要问题。

title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks
authors: Sen Li, Xiaoying Liu, Xiaojian Xu, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Ling Lan
abstract: The laser welding full-penetration is of critical importance, as it constitutes one of the fundamental factors in achieving defect-free welded joints. Accurate prediction of the penetration state is therefore essential for ensuring weld quality. To this end, this paper introduces SimPhysNet, a novel algorithm that achieves high classification accuracy in laser welding penetration prediction using only a limited number of labelled images. This approach effectively overcomes the limitations of supervised learning classification algorithms, which are hindered in industrial applications by their dependence on extensive, high-quality labelled data. The core of SimPhysNet is a unique self-supervised learning paradigm that embeds physical priors into a contrastive learning framework. By incorporating a physics-informed neural network (PINN), the model is guided to extract physically meaningful features of the molten pool and keyhole from a large set of unlabelled data, while three image augmentation tasks further enhance its generalization capabilities. Subsequently, a few-shot learning strategy, based on prototypical networks, enables robust classification by constructing class representations from a minimal set of labelled images. Experimental results demonstrate that SimPhysNet achieves a classification accuracy of 96.06% using only 200 labelled images (approximately 5% of the total labelled dataset), which is comparable to the performance of conventional supervised learning algorithms that utilize the entire labelled dataset. This work presents a new, efficient, and highly accurate method, providing the way for the intelligent automation of laser welding.

infographic.key_insight: SimPhysNet uses physics-informed self-supervised learning plus few-shot prototypical classification to predict laser welding penetration accurately with very little labeled data.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables more scalable, data-efficient weld quality monitoring and supports intelligent automation for defect-free laser welding.
method: Physics-informed neural network (PINN) embeds physical priors into contrastive self-supervised feature learning.
Three image augmentation tasks improve robustness and generalization from unlabeled molten-pool/keyhole images.
Prototypical networks perform few-shot classification using only a small labeled set.
infographic.evidence_signal: The model reached 96.06% classification accuracy using only 200 labeled images, about 5% of the labeled dataset, comparable to fully supervised baselines.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on the availability of representative unlabeled welding images and the reliability of the physics priors under changing process conditions.
infographic.paper_title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks

zh-Hans.title: 基于物理信息神经网络的自监督学习激光焊接过程焊深预测模型
zh-Hans.abstract: 激光焊接全熔透至关重要，因为它是实现无缺陷焊接接头的基本因素之一。因此，准确预测熔透状态对于确保焊接质量至关重要。为此，本文提出 SimPhysNet，一种新颖的算法，仅利用少量标注图像即可在激光焊接熔透预测中实现较高的分类准确率。该方法有效克服了监督学习分类算法的局限性；这类算法在工业应用中因依赖大量高质量标注数据而受到限制。SimPhysNet 的核心是一种独特的自监督学习范式，它将物理先验嵌入对比学习框架中。通过引入物理信息神经网络（PINN），模型被引导从大量未标注数据中提取熔池和小孔的物理有意义特征，同时三项图像增强任务进一步提升了其泛化能力。随后，基于原型网络的小样本学习策略通过从极少量标注图像构建类别表征，实现了稳健分类。实验结果表明，SimPhysNet 仅使用 200 张标注图像（约占全部标注数据集的 5%）即可达到 96.06% 的分类准确率，其性能可与使用全部标注数据集的传统监督学习算法相媲美。该工作提出了一种新的、高效且高精度的方法，为激光焊接的智能自动化提供了途径。

infographic.key_insight: SimPhysNet 结合物理信息自监督学习与小样本原型分类，仅用很少的标注数据即可高精度预测激光焊接熔透。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这使焊接质量监测更具可扩展性和数据效率，并支持无缺陷激光焊接的智能自动化。
method: 物理信息神经网络（PINN）将物理先验嵌入对比式自监督特征学习中。
三项图像增强任务提升了基于未标注熔池/小孔图像的鲁棒性与泛化能力。
原型网络利用少量标注集进行小样本分类。
infographic.evidence_signal: 该模型仅使用 200 张标注图像（约占标注数据集的 5%）就达到了 96.06% 的分类准确率，与全监督基线相当。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能取决于是否具有具有代表性的未标注焊接图像，以及物理先验在工艺条件变化下的可靠性。

title: Computational and machine learning modelling approaches for weld quality predictions in friction stir welding of high-density polyethylene
authors: A. Alhourani, I. Barsoum, J. Sheikh-Ahmad, S. Deveci
abstract: Friction stir welding (FSW) has gained recognition as an effective technique for joining thermoplastic materials. This study presents a comprehensive investigation to predict FSW characteristics such as weld temperatures, vertical axial forces, material flow and defect formation in FSW of high-density polyethylene (HDPE) using both computational and machine learning approaches, validated by experimental results. A three-dimensional Coupled Eulerian-Lagrangian (CEL) numerical model is developed to simulate the HDPE welding process under varying process parameters of rotational and welding speeds, and bottom preheating conditions. The CEL numerical model is validated against experimental data, showing markedly good agreement in predicting void formation, thermal and mechanical responses. Results indicate that preheating the bottom surface proved effective in reducing thermal gradients and stabilizing vertical force fluctuations. Quantitatively, bottom-surface preheating at 60 °C reduced peak plunge force from 1600 N close to 1100 N and raised peak temperatures from 70 °C (without preheat) to about 100 °C, hence smoothing through-thickness gradients and stabilizing the axial force distribution. In parallel, two multilayer perceptron artificial neural networks (ANNs) are trained on experimental data to predict temporal temperature and axial force responses with R2 between 0.91 and 0.99, demonstrating high accuracy and strong generalization across the tested FSW parameter space. The computational CEL simulations accurately predicted weld zone morphology, including stir zone, thermo-mechanically affected zone and heat-affected zone, however the combined CEL–ANN framework enables rapid generation of process maps that highlights defective and defect-free welding windows, with optimal conditions obtained at 1500 rpm and 30 mm/min with 60 °C preheating, and poor weldability observed at 1000 rpm without preheating due to wormhole formation. These findings provide process-driven design guidelines for developing robust HDPE joints and demonstrate how integrating computational modeling with machine learning enables efficient optimization, offering valuable insights into the key characteristics of the FSW process in thermoplastics and supporting its broader adoption in industrial applications.

infographic.key_insight: A coupled CEL simulation plus ANN models can accurately predict friction stir welding quality in HDPE and identify process windows that avoid defects while improving thermal and force stability.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The workflow gives designers a fast way to tune rotational speed, travel speed, and preheating to produce stronger, more reliable thermoplastic welds.
method: 3D Coupled Eulerian-Lagrangian (CEL) model of HDPE FSW
Two multilayer perceptron ANNs trained on experimental temperature and axial-force data
Process-map generation across rotational speed, welding speed, and bottom preheating conditions
infographic.evidence_signal: The ANN models achieved high predictive accuracy with R2 values of 0.91 to 0.99, and the CEL model matched experiments for void formation, thermal response, and mechanical response.
infographic.watch_item: The reported optimal window is based on the tested parameter space, so extrapolation to other HDPE grades, tool geometries, or thicknesses may not be reliable without revalidation.
infographic.paper_title: Computational and machine learning modelling approaches for weld quality predictions in friction stir welding of high-density polyethylene

zh-Hans.title: 用于高密度聚乙烯搅拌摩擦焊焊接质量预测的计算与机器学习建模方法
zh-Hans.abstract: 搅拌摩擦焊（FSW）已被公认为一种连接热塑性材料的有效技术。本研究采用计算方法和机器学习方法，结合实验结果验证，对高密度聚乙烯（HDPE）搅拌摩擦焊中的焊缝温度、竖向轴向力、材料流动和缺陷形成等FSW特征进行了全面研究并进行预测。建立了三维耦合欧拉-拉格朗日（CEL）数值模型，用于在不同工艺参数（转速、焊接速度以及底部预热条件）下模拟HDPE焊接过程。CEL数值模型与实验数据进行了验证，在预测空洞形成、热响应和力学响应方面表现出显著良好的一致性。结果表明，对底表面进行预热可有效降低热梯度并稳定竖向力波动。定量而言，底表面在60 °C下预热将峰值压入力从接近1600 N降低至约1100 N，并将峰值温度从70 °C（无预热）提高到约100 °C，从而平滑厚度方向梯度并稳定轴向力分布。与此同时，基于实验数据训练了两个多层感知器人工神经网络（ANNs），用于预测时间变化的温度和轴向力响应，其R2介于0.91到0.99之间，表明在所测试的FSW参数空间内具有很高的准确性和较强的泛化能力。计算CEL模拟准确预测了焊缝区形貌，包括搅拌区、热-机械影响区和热影响区；此外，组合CEL–ANN框架能够快速生成工艺图，突出显示有缺陷和无缺陷的焊接窗口。最优条件为1500 rpm和30 mm/min，并采用60 °C预热；而在1000 rpm且无预热时，由于形成虫孔而观察到较差的焊接性。这些发现为开发稳健的HDPE接头提供了基于工艺的设计指南，并表明将计算建模与机器学习相结合能够实现高效优化，为理解热塑性材料FSW过程的关键特征提供了有价值的见解，并支持其在工业应用中的更广泛采用。

infographic.key_insight: 耦合CEL仿真与ANN模型可准确预测HDPE搅拌摩擦焊质量，并识别可避免缺陷、同时提升热稳定性和力稳定性的工艺窗口。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该工作流程为设计人员提供了一种快速调节转速、焊接速度和预热条件的方法，以制备更强、更可靠的热塑性材料焊接接头。
method: 用于HDPE FSW的三维耦合欧拉-拉格朗日（CEL）模型
基于实验温度与轴向力数据训练的两个多层感知器ANN
在转速、焊接速度和底部预热条件下生成工艺图
infographic.evidence_signal: ANN模型取得了很高的预测精度，R2值为0.91至0.99；CEL模型在空洞形成、热响应和力学响应方面与实验结果一致。
infographic.watch_item: 所报告的最优窗口基于已测试的参数空间，因此在未重新验证的情况下，将其外推到其他HDPE牌号、工具几何形状或厚度可能并不可靠。

title: System-Level Automation Strategies for Improving Positional Accuracy in Robotic Welding for High-Reliability Manufacturing
authors: Sangat Naik
abstract: Robotic welding has become a critical enabling technology in high-reliability manufacturing environments, particularly in aerospace and space-grade production systems where dimensional accuracy and repeatability are essential. While conventional approaches to accuracy enhancement often rely on hardware upgrades, calibration refinement, or sensor-based feedback systems, comparatively limited attention has been given to structured automation-logic optimization as a pathway for improving welding precision. This paper proposes a system-level automation accuracy framework for robotic welding applications, emphasizing repeatable initialization, structured task sequencing, conservative motion planning, and transition smoothness control. Rather than modifying hardware architecture, the proposed framework targets error propagation mechanisms arising from kinematic tolerances, motion discontinuities, and cumulative trajectory deviations. By analyzing robotic welding as an integrated automation system, the study establishes a structured methodology for improving positional consistency in high-reliability manufacturing contexts. The framework is particularly relevant to space manufacturing environments, where stability, predictability, and conservative control design are prioritized over aggressive performance optimization. The proposed approach provides a foundation for future integration with digital twin and intelligent manufacturing systems.
venue: Zenodo (CERN European Organization for Nuclear Research)

infographic.key_insight: Positional accuracy in robotic welding can be improved more by optimizing automation logic and motion sequencing than by changing the robot hardware itself.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The framework is relevant for high-reliability manufacturing such as aerospace and space-grade production, where repeatability, stability, and conservative control are more important than maximum speed.
method: Use repeatable initialization to reduce setup variability
Apply structured task sequencing to limit error propagation
Implement conservative motion planning and smoother transitions
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract presents a conceptual system-level framework and methodology, but does not report experimental data, quantitative accuracy gains, or benchmark results.
infographic.watch_item: Because the approach emphasizes conservative control and structured automation, it may trade off throughput or cycle time and will need validation on real welding cells.
infographic.paper_title: System-Level Automation Strategies for Improving Positional Accuracy in Robotic Welding for High-Reliability Manufacturing

zh-Hans.title: 用于提高高可靠性制造中机器人焊接位置精度的系统级自动化策略
zh-Hans.abstract: 机器人焊接已成为高可靠性制造环境中的关键支撑技术，尤其是在航空航天及航天级生产系统中，尺寸精度和重复性至关重要。尽管传统的精度提升方法通常依赖硬件升级、标定改进或基于传感器的反馈系统，但对于通过结构化自动化逻辑优化来提升焊接精度这一途径，相关关注相对有限。本文提出一种面向机器人焊接应用的系统级自动化精度框架，强调可重复初始化、结构化任务排序、保守的运动规划以及过渡平滑性控制。该框架不对硬件架构进行修改，而是针对由运动学公差、运动不连续性和轨迹累积偏差引起的误差传播机制进行优化。通过将机器人焊接视为一个集成自动化系统，本研究建立了一种结构化方法，用于在高可靠性制造场景中提升位置一致性。该框架尤其适用于航天制造环境，在这类环境中，稳定性、可预测性以及保守的控制设计优先于激进的性能优化。所提出的方法为未来与数字孪生和智能制造系统的集成奠定了基础。

infographic.key_insight: 通过优化自动化逻辑和运动排序，而非改变机器人硬件本身，可以提升机器人焊接中的位置精度。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该框架适用于航空航天和航天级生产等高可靠性制造领域，在这些场景中，重复性、稳定性和保守控制比最高速度更重要。
method: 使用可重复初始化以降低设置变异性
采用结构化任务排序以限制误差传播
实施保守的运动规划与更平滑的过渡
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要提出了一个概念性的系统级框架和方法学，但未报告实验数据、定量精度提升或基准测试结果。
infographic.watch_item: 由于该方法强调保守控制和结构化自动化，其可能以降低吞吐量或循环时间为代价，并且需要在真实焊接单元上进行验证。

title: System-Level Automation Strategies for Improving Positional Accuracy in Robotic Welding for High-Reliability Manufacturing
authors: Sangat Naik
abstract: Robotic welding has become a critical enabling technology in high-reliability manufacturing environments, particularly in aerospace and space-grade production systems where dimensional accuracy and repeatability are essential. While conventional approaches to accuracy enhancement often rely on hardware upgrades, calibration refinement, or sensor-based feedback systems, comparatively limited attention has been given to structured automation-logic optimization as a pathway for improving welding precision. This paper proposes a system-level automation accuracy framework for robotic welding applications, emphasizing repeatable initialization, structured task sequencing, conservative motion planning, and transition smoothness control. Rather than modifying hardware architecture, the proposed framework targets error propagation mechanisms arising from kinematic tolerances, motion discontinuities, and cumulative trajectory deviations. By analyzing robotic welding as an integrated automation system, the study establishes a structured methodology for improving positional consistency in high-reliability manufacturing contexts. The framework is particularly relevant to space manufacturing environments, where stability, predictability, and conservative control design are prioritized over aggressive performance optimization. The proposed approach provides a foundation for future integration with digital twin and intelligent manufacturing systems.
venue: Zenodo (CERN European Organization for Nuclear Research)

infographic.key_insight: The paper argues that robotic welding positional accuracy can be improved by optimizing automation logic—such as initialization, sequencing, motion planning, and transitions—rather than changing hardware.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This is relevant for high-reliability manufacturing, especially aerospace and space-grade production, where repeatability and conservative control are more important than maximizing speed.
method: Repeatable initialization to reduce setup variability
Structured task sequencing to limit cumulative error propagation
Conservative motion planning with smooth transitions to avoid trajectory discontinuities
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract describes a conceptual framework and system-level analysis, but does not report quantitative experiments or benchmark results.
infographic.watch_item: The approach may be limited by dependence on existing robot kinematics and may require careful validation before deployment in safety-critical manufacturing lines.
infographic.paper_title: System-Level Automation Strategies for Improving Positional Accuracy in Robotic Welding for High-Reliability Manufacturing

zh-Hans.title: 提高高可靠性制造中机器人焊接位置精度的系统级自动化策略
zh-Hans.abstract: 机器人焊接已成为高可靠性制造环境中的关键使能技术，尤其是在航空航天和空间级生产系统中，尺寸精度和重复性至关重要。尽管传统的精度提升方法通常依赖硬件升级、标定改进或基于传感器的反馈系统，但对于通过结构化自动化逻辑优化来提高焊接精度的关注相对有限。本文提出一种用于机器人焊接应用的系统级自动化精度框架，强调可重复初始化、结构化任务排序、保守运动规划以及过渡平滑性控制。所提出的框架并不修改硬件架构，而是针对由运动学公差、运动不连续性和累积轨迹偏差引起的误差传播机制进行优化。通过将机器人焊接视为一个集成自动化系统，本文建立了一种用于提高高可靠性制造场景中位置一致性的结构化方法。该框架尤其适用于空间制造环境，在这类环境中，稳定性、可预测性和保守的控制设计优先于激进的性能优化。所提出的方法为未来与数字孪生和智能制造系统的集成奠定了基础。

infographic.key_insight: 本文认为，机器人焊接的位置精度可以通过优化自动化逻辑——例如初始化、排序、运动规划和过渡——来提高，而不是通过更改硬件来实现。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这对高可靠性制造具有重要意义，尤其适用于航空航天和空间级生产，因为在这些场景中，重复性和保守控制比最大化速度更重要。
method: 通过可重复初始化减少设置差异
通过结构化任务排序限制累积误差传播
采用具有平滑过渡的保守运动规划以避免轨迹不连续
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要描述了一个概念框架和系统级分析，但未报告定量实验或基准结果。
infographic.watch_item: 该方法可能受限于对现有机器人运动学的依赖，并且在部署到安全关键制造产线之前可能需要严格验证。

title: Effects of Laser Welding on the Microstructure and Fatigue Behavior of Strenx 700 CR Steel
authors: William Haupt, João Vitor Miszewski, Diogo Teixeira, Cleiton Gnich, Matheus Giongo Pavan, Lucas Ghellioni Borges
abstract: Abstract This study examines the cold-rolled microalloyed steel Strenx 700, with a minimum yield strength of 700 MPa, used in the manufacture of agricultural machinery and implements. The aim is to improve the weight/mechanical strength ratio and apply new advanced welding processes, such as laser welding. In the context of the agricultural machinery industry, laser welding is gaining prominence in the welding of thin microalloyed steels, mainly due to its small heat-affected zone and welding speed, which allow for superior mechanical properties, longer fatigue life, and excellent surface finish of welded joints compared to GMAW and GTAW welding processes. In this context, the behavior of laser-welded joints in Strenx 700 microalloyed steel was evaluated in the welding of plates used in agricultural implement components subjected to cyclic loads. The microstructural properties, mechanical properties, and fatigue life are not yet clearly documented in the literature. This work aimed to evaluate the performance of manual welds produced using a CO₂ laser process and to elucidate their effects on the microstructure, mechanical properties, and fatigue behavior of 2 mm thick Strenx 700 cold-rolled steel sheets. Based on technical evaluations through pre-tests, it was determined that the welds would be performed autogenously with welding powers of 1100, 1300, and 1500 Watts, using joints with parallel edge preparation without root opening, in order to optimize the processes and reduce industrial costs. After welding, joint characterization was performed using macrographs and micrographs obtained by optical and electron microscopy, in addition to microhardness mapping, tensile testing, and evaluation of uniaxial fatigue life in tension-tension conditions. The results indicate satisfactory macroscopic weld formation. In the fusion zone, the microstructure consisted predominantly of martensite, Widmanstätten ferrite and bainite. In the coarse-grained heat-affected zone (CGA), bainite, Widmanstätten ferrite, and martensite were observed, while in the fine-grained heat-affected zone (FGA), ferrite and martensite were identified. The base metal was composed of ferrite, bainite, and martensite. The mechanical strength of the welded joints was comparable to that of the base metal; however, the elongation values were lower than those of the base metal. The mean fatigue life of the base material was 450,128 cycles, significantly higher than that of the welded conditions, with average values of 50,055 cycles for the welded group (c), followed by group (b) with 44,962 cycles, while the welded group (a) presented a mean fatigue life of 30,338 cycles. As main conclusions, we can observe the good microstructural formation of the joints for all welding conditions, with adequate mechanical strength values, but with reduced elongation and predominant fracture in the heat-affected zone and in the fusion region. It is also possible to conclude that the average fatigue life values were lower for the welded conditions compared to the base material, this result being strongly impacted by the presence of welding defects related to the process.
venue: Lasers in Manufacturing and Materials Processing

infographic.key_insight: CO₂ laser welding of 2 mm Strenx 700 CR steel can produce sound joints with a narrow heat-affected zone, but it significantly alters local microstructure toward harder phases such as martensite and bainite.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For lightweight agricultural machinery components, laser welding offers a path to high-strength, fast fabrication with potentially better fatigue performance than conventional arc welding.
method: Autogenous CO₂ laser welding at 1100, 1300, and 1500 W
Parallel-edge joints without root opening on 2 mm cold-rolled Strenx 700 sheets
Post-weld macro/microstructure, microhardness, tensile, and tension-tension fatigue evaluation
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports satisfactory weld formation and phase mapping across the fusion zone and heat-affected zones using optical/electron microscopy, hardness mapping, tensile tests, and uniaxial fatigue testing.
infographic.watch_item: Higher laser power can increase local thermal cycling and hard-phase formation, so fatigue behavior and cracking risk must be validated before industrial deployment.
infographic.paper_title: Effects of Laser Welding on the Microstructure and Fatigue Behavior of Strenx 700 CR Steel

zh-Hans.title: 激光焊接对Strenx 700 CR钢微观组织和疲劳行为的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 摘要 本研究考察了冷轧微合金钢Strenx 700，该材料的最小屈服强度为700 MPa，广泛用于农业机械和农机具制造。研究目的是提高重量/机械强度比，并应用新的先进焊接工艺，如激光焊接。在农业机械行业背景下，激光焊接在薄型微合金钢焊接中的重要性日益提升，主要由于其热影响区小、焊接速度快，与GMAW和GTAW焊接工艺相比，可使焊接接头具有更优的力学性能、更长的疲劳寿命和更佳的表面质量。在此背景下，评估了Strenx 700微合金钢激光焊接接头在承受循环载荷的农业机具部件板材焊接中的行为。关于其微观组织特性、力学性能和疲劳寿命，文献中尚无明确记载。本研究旨在评估采用CO₂激光工艺制备的手工焊接接头的性能，并阐明其对2 mm厚Strenx 700冷轧钢板微观组织、力学性能和疲劳行为的影响。基于预试验的技术评估，确定焊接采用自熔焊，焊接功率分别为1100、1300和1500 W，接头采用平行边缘、无根部间隙的坡口形式，以优化工艺并降低工业成本。焊后通过光学和电子显微镜获得的宏观金相和微观组织图像，以及显微硬度分布、拉伸试验和拉-拉条件下单轴疲劳寿命评估，对接头进行表征。结果表明焊缝宏观成形令人满意。在熔合区，微观组织主要由马氏体、魏氏铁素体和贝氏体组成。在粗晶热影响区（CGA）观察到贝氏体、魏氏铁素体和马氏体，而在细晶热影响区（FGA）则识别出铁素体和马氏体。母材由铁素体、贝氏体和马氏体组成。焊接接头的力学强度与母材相当；然而，其延伸率低于母材。母材的平均疲劳寿命为450,128次循环，显著高于焊接状态；其中焊接组（c）的平均疲劳寿命为50,055次循环，随后是组（b）的44,962次循环，而焊接组（a）的平均疲劳寿命为30,338次循环。主要结论为：所有焊接条件下接头均表现出良好的微观组织形成，并具有适当的力学强度值，但延伸率降低，且断裂主要发生在热影响区和熔合区。还可得出结论，与母材相比，焊接状态的平均疲劳寿命更低，这一结果受到与工艺相关的焊接缺陷存在的显著影响。

infographic.key_insight: 2 mm Strenx 700 CR钢的CO₂激光焊接可形成质量良好的接头，并具有较窄的热影响区，但会显著改变局部微观组织，使其向马氏体和贝氏体等更硬相转变。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于轻量化农业机械部件，激光焊接为实现高强度、快速制造，并可能获得优于传统电弧焊的疲劳性能提供了路径。
method: 1100、1300和1500 W条件下的自熔CO₂激光焊接
2 mm冷轧Strenx 700板材采用无根部间隙的平行边接头
焊后宏观/微观组织、显微硬度、拉伸和拉-拉疲劳评估
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了焊缝成形令人满意，并通过光学/电子显微镜、硬度分布、拉伸试验和单轴疲劳试验对熔合区及热影响区进行了相分析和表征。
infographic.watch_item: 较高的激光功率会增加局部热循环和硬相形成，因此在工业应用前必须验证疲劳行为和裂纹风险。

title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: In laser penetration welding, the assessment of penetration state and weld seam morphology plays a crucial role in determining the weld quality. This paper presents a comprehensive introduction of the innovative muti-task deep learning model that has the capability to predict penetration state, depth, and weld seam morphology with high accuracy. The monitoring platform relies on weld pool images captured during the laser welding process using a complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor camera. The proposed model integrates spatiotemporal features extracted from top weld pool images along with welding parameters, establishing a deep learning framework based on convolutional neural networks and state space models for more efficient extraction and processing of spatial-temporal information. Furthermore, a reliable method for constructing the dataset is proposed to enhance both robustness and generalization capability of the developed model. Validation results on the test set demonstrate that prediction accuracy for penetration state can reach 99.35%, while prediction error for penetration depth is 1.79 millimeter, and accuracy of reconstructing the weld cross-section is 95.65%. This study provides new insights and methodologies for in-situ quality control strategies in laser penetration welding systems.

infographic.key_insight: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep network can use weld-pool images plus process parameters to predict penetration state, depth, and seam morphology during laser welding.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The method supports in-situ quality control by enabling early detection of weld defects and more reliable process monitoring in laser penetration welding.
method: Capture top weld-pool images with a CMOS camera during welding.
Fuse spatial-temporal features from images with welding parameters using CNNs and state-space models.
Train a multi-task model to jointly predict penetration state, penetration depth, and weld cross-section morphology.
infographic.evidence_signal: On the test set, the model achieved 99.35% penetration-state accuracy, 1.79 mm penetration-depth error, and 95.65% cross-section reconstruction accuracy.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on dataset construction and sensor consistency, so generalization to different materials, geometries, or welding setups should be validated.
infographic.paper_title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding

zh-Hans.title: 用于预测激光焊接中熔深和形貌的多任务时空深度神经网络
zh-Hans.abstract: 在激光穿透焊接中，对熔深状态和焊缝形貌的评估在确定焊接质量方面起着关键作用。本文对一种具有创新性的多任务深度学习模型进行了全面介绍，该模型能够高精度预测熔深状态、熔深以及焊缝形貌。该监测平台依赖于使用互补金属氧化物半导体（CMOS）相机在激光焊接过程中采集的熔池图像。所提出的模型将从顶部熔池图像中提取的时空特征与焊接参数相结合，建立了一个基于卷积神经网络和状态空间模型的深度学习框架，以更高效地提取和处理时空信息。此外，本文提出了一种可靠的数据集构建方法，以增强所开发模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。测试集上的验证结果表明，熔深状态预测准确率可达99.35%，熔深预测误差为1.79毫米，焊缝截面重建准确率为95.65%。本研究为激光穿透焊接系统中的原位质量控制策略提供了新的见解和方法。

infographic.key_insight: 多任务时空深度网络可利用熔池图像和工艺参数，在激光焊接过程中预测熔深状态、熔深和焊缝形貌。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该方法通过实现焊接缺陷的早期检测和更可靠的激光穿透焊接过程监测，支持原位质量控制。
method: 在焊接过程中使用CMOS相机采集顶部熔池图像。
利用CNN和状态空间模型融合图像中的时空特征与焊接参数。
训练多任务模型，联合预测熔深状态、熔深以及焊缝截面形貌。
infographic.evidence_signal: 在测试集上，该模型实现了99.35%的熔深状态准确率、1.79毫米的熔深误差以及95.65%的截面重建准确率。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能依赖于数据集构建和传感器一致性，因此应在不同材料、几何形状或焊接设置下验证其泛化能力。

title: Enhanced Seam Segmentation for Automated Welding Robot in Construction Through Transfer Learning: Addressing Limitations of Bilateral Segmentation Network
authors: Keonvin Park, Yong Ann Voeurn, Hyeokjun Kweon, Doyun Lee
abstract: Reliable seam segmentation is essential for autonomous robotic welding in construction, where harsh illumination, specular reflections, and thin weld geometries often degrade segmentation performance. This study proposes a reflection-robust seam segmentation framework that enhances a BiSeNetV2 backbone through transfer learning and a hybrid Cross-Entropy--Lovász loss. Rather than increasing architectural complexity, the proposed framework improves reflection robustness through learning-stability-oriented optimization. Experimental results show that the proposed method achieves 81.76\% Joint IoU and 90.73\% mIoU, improving Joint IoU by +22.36 percentage points over the OHEM-based baseline while maintaining identical FLOPs, parameter count, and inference speed. The proposed approach also recovers 96.33\% of severe zero-IoU failure cases under reflective conditions. Comparative experiments across BiSeNetV2, DeepLabV3+, UNet, and SegFormer further demonstrate that the proposed optimization strategy is particularly effective for lightweight real-time segmentation architectures. Qualitative analyses additionally show improved seam continuity and reflection robustness in challenging welding environments. These findings suggest that the proposed framework provides a practical and lightweight perception solution for robotic welding applications involving reflective metallic surfaces.

infographic.key_insight: A lightweight transfer-learning and hybrid Cross-Entropy–Lovász training strategy makes BiSeNetV2 far more robust for seam segmentation under reflective welding conditions without changing the model architecture.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This offers a practical real-time perception upgrade for construction welding robots, improving seam detection on shiny metal surfaces while preserving the speed and efficiency needed for deployment.
method: Start from a BiSeNetV2 backbone and apply transfer learning for seam segmentation.
Use a hybrid Cross-Entropy–Lovász loss to stabilize learning and improve boundary continuity.
Focus optimization on reflection robustness rather than adding network complexity.
infographic.evidence_signal: The method reached 81.76% Joint IoU and 90.73% mIoU, improving Joint IoU by 22.36 points over the OHEM baseline while keeping FLOPs, parameters, and inference speed unchanged.
infographic.watch_item: Performance gains are shown in the reported welding datasets and may still require site-specific validation for different metal finishes, lighting conditions, and seam geometries.
infographic.paper_title: Enhanced Seam Segmentation for Automated Welding Robot in Construction Through Transfer Learning: Addressing Limitations of Bilateral Segmentation Network

zh-Hans.title: 通过迁移学习增强建筑自动焊接机器人缝隙分割：解决双边分割网络的局限性
zh-Hans.abstract: 在建筑领域的自主机器人焊接中，可靠的焊缝分割至关重要，因为恶劣照明、镜面反射以及细窄的焊缝几何形状往往会降低分割性能。本研究提出了一种抗反射的焊缝分割框架，通过迁移学习和混合的 Cross-Entropy--Lovász 损失函数增强 BiSeNetV2 主干网络。该方法并不增加架构复杂度，而是通过面向学习稳定性的优化来提升抗反射能力。实验结果表明，所提方法达到 81.76% 的 Joint IoU 和 90.73% 的 mIoU，相比基于 OHEM 的基线方法，Joint IoU 提升了 22.36 个百分点，同时保持相同的 FLOPs、参数量和推理速度。所提方法还在反射条件下恢复了 96.33% 的严重零 IoU 失效案例。跨 BiSeNetV2、DeepLabV3+、UNet 和 SegFormer 的对比实验进一步表明，所提优化策略对轻量级实时分割架构尤为有效。定性分析还显示，在具有挑战性的焊接环境中，焊缝连续性和抗反射能力均有所提升。这些结果表明，所提框架为涉及反射金属表面的机器人焊接应用提供了一种实用且轻量的感知解决方案。

infographic.key_insight: 一种轻量级的迁移学习与混合 Cross-Entropy–Lovász 训练策略，使 BiSeNetV2 在反射焊接条件下的焊缝分割鲁棒性大幅提升，而无需改变模型架构。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为建筑焊接机器人提供了一种实用的实时感知升级，可在保持部署所需速度和效率的同时，提升其在高反光金属表面上的焊缝检测能力。
method: 从 BiSeNetV2 主干网络出发，并应用迁移学习进行焊缝分割。
采用混合 Cross-Entropy–Lovász 损失函数以稳定学习并改善边界连续性。
将优化重点放在抗反射能力上，而不是增加网络复杂度。
infographic.evidence_signal: 该方法达到了 81.76% 的 Joint IoU 和 90.73% 的 mIoU，相比 OHEM 基线，Joint IoU 提高了 22.36 个百分点，同时 FLOPs、参数量和推理速度保持不变。
infographic.watch_item: 性能提升基于所报告的焊接数据集，但对于不同金属表面处理、照明条件和焊缝几何形状，仍可能需要进行现场特定验证。

title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: Supervised deep learning has been widely used for weld penetration state classification; however, its performance often degrades significantly under domain shift, such as when transferring models between welding processes with distinct physical mechanisms:for instance, from arc-dominated tungsten inert gas (TIG) welding to keyhole-based laser welding. To overcome this limitation, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) framework integrated with a gradual source domain expansion (GSDE) strategy. Evaluated on dedicated TIG and laser welding datasets, our approach achieves high accuracy in both same-process and cross-process transfer tasks. Specifically, it attains average accuracies of 90.65% on TIGFH and 90.72% on LSPS in same-process settings, surpassing a supervised baseline by 35.83% and 38.87%, respectively. More notably, in cross-process scenarios, it reaches 80.48% for TIG to Laser and 81.13% for Laser to TIG, improving upon the baseline by 43.39% and 43.40%. UMAP visualizations verify that the model learns domain-invariant features while maintaining discriminative class boundaries. This method considerably lowers the relabeling cost for new welding processes and enhances the versatility of intelligent monitoring across different welding systems.

infographic.key_insight: An unsupervised domain adaptation framework with gradual source domain expansion enables reliable weld penetration status prediction across fundamentally different welding processes (TIG and laser) without requiring extensive relabeling.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The approach improves intelligent welding monitoring and makes models more transferable between process types, reducing deployment cost when moving to new welding systems.
method: Train a UDA model to align feature distributions between labeled source and unlabeled target welding domains.
Use gradual source domain expansion (GSDE) to progressively incorporate source samples and stabilize cross-domain learning.
Validate with UMAP to confirm domain-invariant features and preserved class separation.
infographic.evidence_signal: The method achieved 90.65% on TIGFH and 90.72% on LSPS in same-process tests, and 80.48% TIG-to-laser plus 81.13% laser-to-TIG in cross-process transfer, far above the supervised baseline.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may still depend on how representative the source and target welding datasets are, so adaptation quality could drop when process settings or sensor conditions change substantially.
infographic.paper_title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding

zh-Hans.title: 一种基于激光焊接和TIG焊接中无监督领域自适应的跨工艺焊接熔深状态预测算法
zh-Hans.abstract: 监督式深度学习已被广泛用于焊缝熔深状态分类；然而，当模型在具有不同物理机制的焊接工艺之间迁移时，其性能往往会因领域偏移而显著下降：例如，从以电弧为主的钨极惰性气体（TIG）焊接迁移到基于小孔效应的激光焊接。为克服这一局限，我们提出了一种结合渐进式源域扩展（GSDE）策略的无监督领域自适应（UDA）框架。该方法在专门的TIG和激光焊接数据集上进行评估，在同工艺和跨工艺迁移任务中均取得了较高精度。具体而言，在同工艺设置下，它在TIGFH和LSPS上分别达到90.65%和90.72%的平均准确率，较监督基线分别提高了35.83%和38.87%。更值得注意的是，在跨工艺场景中，其TIG到激光和激光到TIG的准确率分别达到80.48%和81.13%，较基线分别提升了43.39%和43.40%。UMAP可视化验证了该模型在保持可分辨类别边界的同时学习到了域不变特征。该方法显著降低了新焊接工艺的重新标注成本，并增强了跨不同焊接系统的智能监测通用性。

infographic.key_insight: 结合渐进式源域扩展的无监督领域自适应框架，使得无需大量重新标注即可在本质上不同的焊接工艺（TIG和激光）之间可靠预测焊缝熔深状态。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该方法提升了智能焊接监测能力，并增强了模型在不同工艺类型之间的可迁移性，从而在迁移到新的焊接系统时降低部署成本。
method: 训练UDA模型，以对齐有标注源焊接域与无标注目标焊接域之间的特征分布。
采用渐进式源域扩展（GSDE），逐步纳入源样本并稳定跨域学习。
使用UMAP进行验证，以确认域不变特征以及保持的类别分离。
infographic.evidence_signal: 该方法在同工艺测试中于TIGFH上达到90.65%、在LSPS上达到90.72%；在跨工艺迁移中，TIG到激光为80.48%、激光到TIG为81.13%，均远高于监督基线。
infographic.watch_item: 性能仍可能取决于源域和目标域焊接数据集的代表性，因此当工艺参数或传感器条件发生显著变化时，自适应质量可能下降。

title: COMPARATIVE INVESTIGATIONS ON THE WELD DEPTH OF PENETRATION IN ACTIVATED TIG WELDING OF STAINLESS STEEL THROUGH THE USE OF BINARY FLUX MIXTURE
authors: R. Sakthivel, M. Sudhahar, Kannan V
abstract: Conventional Tungsten Inert Gas (TIG) welding is widely employed for joining stainless steel; however, its relatively shallow weld penetration often requires multiple welding passes and additional joint preparation for medium-thickness plates. Activated Tungsten Inert Gas (A-TIG) welding offers an effective alternative by employing activating fluxes to improve heat concentration within the weld zone. The present study investigates the effect of a binary oxide flux consisting of zirconium dioxide (ZrO₂) and aluminium oxide (Al₂O₃) on the weld penetration characteristics of AISI 304 austenitic stainless steel through a comparative evaluation of conventional TIG and ATIG welding. Bead-on-plate welding experiments were carried out under identical process parameters using an automated welding system to ensure that the influence of the binary flux could be evaluated independently. The welded specimens were prepared using standard metallographic procedures, and the weld bead geometry was assessed by measuring penetration depth, bead width, and the depth-to-width ratio. The experimental observations showed that the application of the ZrO₂–Al₂O₃ binary flux produced a deeper and narrower weld profile than conventional TIG welding, indicating improved utilisation of heat within the fusion zone. The enhancement in weld geometry is attributed to the combined influence of arc constriction and the modification of molten metal flow within the weld pool. The results demonstrate that the proposed binary oxide flux is an effective approach for improving weld penetration and can contribute to more efficient single-pass welding of medium-thickness AISI 304 stainless steel components.
venue: International Journal of Drug Delivery Technology

infographic.key_insight: A ZrO2–Al2O3 binary activating flux in A-TIG welding produces a deeper, narrower weld on AISI 304 stainless steel than conventional TIG, improving penetration efficiency.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This can reduce the need for multiple passes and joint preparation in medium-thickness stainless-steel fabrication, lowering time and heat input.
method: Bead-on-plate welds were made on AISI 304 under identical automated TIG process parameters.
A binary oxide flux of ZrO2 and Al2O3 was applied for ATIG comparisons.
Weld geometry was evaluated by penetration depth, bead width, and depth-to-width ratio.
infographic.evidence_signal: Metallographic measurements showed the flux-assisted ATIG welds had increased penetration and a narrower bead profile relative to conventional TIG.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on precise flux application and may need re-optimization for different alloys, plate thicknesses, or welding setups.
infographic.paper_title: COMPARATIVE INVESTIGATIONS ON THE WELD DEPTH OF PENETRATION IN ACTIVATED TIG WELDING OF STAINLESS STEEL THROUGH THE USE OF BINARY FLUX MIXTURE

zh-Hans.title: 利用二元助焊剂混合物对不锈钢活化 TIG 焊熔深的对比研究
zh-Hans.abstract: 传统钨极惰性气体（TIG）焊广泛用于不锈钢连接；然而，其相对较浅的焊缝熔深往往要求中等厚度板材进行多道焊接和额外的接头准备。活化钨极惰性气体（A-TIG）焊通过采用活化焊剂来提高焊接区内的热量集中，提供了一种有效替代方案。本研究通过对传统 TIG 和 ATIG 焊的比较评价，考察了由二氧化锆（ZrO₂）和氧化铝（Al₂O₃）组成的二元氧化物焊剂对 AISI 304 奥氏体不锈钢焊缝熔深特性的影响。采用自动化焊接系统在相同工艺参数下进行了平板堆焊试验，以确保能够独立评估二元焊剂的影响。按照标准金相制样程序制备焊接试样，并通过测量熔深、焊缝宽度以及深宽比来评估焊缝几何形貌。实验结果表明，施加 ZrO₂–Al₂O₃ 二元焊剂后，焊缝轮廓较传统 TIG 焊更深且更窄，表明热量在熔合区内的利用效率得到提高。焊缝几何形貌的改善归因于电弧收缩以及熔池内熔融金属流动变化的共同作用。结果表明，所提出的二元氧化物焊剂是提高焊缝熔深的有效方法，并可促进中等厚度 AISI 304 不锈钢构件更高效的单道焊接。

infographic.key_insight: A-TIG 焊中采用 ZrO2–Al2O3 二元活化焊剂，可在 AISI 304 不锈钢上形成比传统 TIG 更深、更窄的焊缝，从而提高熔深效率。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这可减少中等厚度不锈钢制造中的多道焊和接头准备需求，降低时间和热输入。
method: 在相同的自动化 TIG 工艺参数下，对 AISI 304 进行平板堆焊。
在 ATIG 对比中使用了由 ZrO2 和 Al2O3 组成的二元氧化物焊剂。
通过熔深、焊缝宽度和深宽比评估焊缝几何形貌。
infographic.evidence_signal: 金相测量显示，与传统 TIG 相比，施加焊剂的 ATIG 焊缝熔深增加，焊缝轮廓更窄。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能取决于焊剂的精确施加，并且在不同合金、板厚或焊接设置下可能需要重新优化。

title: Design and Development of Automatic Seam Welding of Pipes
authors: F. K. Pathan, A. I. Gond, S. D. Aade, G.N. Deshpande
abstract: Productivity, operational safety, and uniform quality act as the vital drivers for modern manufacturing sectors. Industries continuously seek out advanced automation to secure market leadership and minimize dependency on highly variable manual interventions. This paper details the design, fabrication, and optimization of an automatic seam welding setup purposefully engineered for the continuous joining of cylindrical metal pipes. Utilizing a robust mechanical frame integrated with specialized workpiece-holding fixtures and programmable pneumatic clamping actuators, the system ensures rigid, vibration-free alignment throughout the operation. A dedicated gear motor drive mechanism, running within a controlled speed range of 10–15 RPM, governs the precise rotational velocity of the components to sustain continuous weld beads. The experimental phase involved a metallurgical and structural comparative analysis between Cold Rolled Carbon Steel (CRCS) and Medium Carbon Steel (ER34). Process parameters, including welding current ranges of 11–13 A and wall thicknesses of 2.5 mm, were closely evaluated. Crucially, the implementation of internal water-cooled CuCrZr alloy rotating wheel electrodes effectively minimized extreme heat buildup and localized degradation. The automated setup successfully suppressed joint leakage failure rates from a baseline of 15% down to less than 3%. Ultimately, this research yields a scalable, ergonomically secure, and highly productive manufacturing configuration that satisfies stringent industrial quality assurance standards while offering an accessible pathway toward full industrial automation. Keywords: Seam welding, Automation in welding, MIG welding, Cold Rolled Carbon Steel, ER34 Medium Carbon Steel, Manufacturing Engineering materials.
venue: International Scientific Journal of Engineering and Management

infographic.key_insight: The paper shows that a purpose-built automated seam welding system can deliver more consistent pipe joining by combining rigid fixturing, controlled rotation, and pneumatic clamping.
infographic.engineering_relevance: It is relevant to manufacturing automation because it reduces manual variability, improves operator safety, and enables more uniform weld quality in cylindrical pipe production.
method: Designed and fabricated an automatic seam welding rig with a mechanical frame, workpiece fixtures, and programmable pneumatic clamps.
Used a gear-motor drive to maintain controlled pipe rotation at 10–15 RPM for continuous weld-bead formation.
Compared welding performance on CRCS and ER34 pipes while evaluating current and wall-thickness effects; added internal water-cooled CuCrZr rotating wheel electrodes for heat control.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports a leakage-failure reduction from 15% in the baseline setup to below 3% after implementing the automated system and cooling strategy.
infographic.watch_item: Performance appears validated on a limited material and parameter range, so scale-up to other pipe sizes, alloys, or higher-throughput conditions may require re-tuning.
infographic.paper_title: Design and Development of Automatic Seam Welding of Pipes

zh-Hans.title: 管道自动纵缝焊接的设计与开发
zh-Hans.abstract: 生产效率、运行安全性和质量均匀性是现代制造业的重要驱动力。各行业持续寻求先进自动化技术，以获取市场领先地位并减少对高度波动的人工操作的依赖。本文详细介绍了一套自动纵缝焊接装置的设计、制造与优化，该装置专为圆柱形金属管的连续连接而开发。该系统采用坚固的机械框架，并集成专用工件夹持夹具和可编程气动夹紧执行器，可在整个作业过程中确保刚性、无振动的对中。专用齿轮电机驱动机构在10–15 RPM的受控速度范围内运行，精确控制部件的旋转速度，以维持连续焊缝焊道。实验阶段对冷轧碳钢（CRCS）和中碳钢（ER34）进行了金相与结构对比分析。对焊接电流范围11–13 A和壁厚2.5 mm等工艺参数进行了重点评估。尤为关键的是，内部水冷CuCrZr合金旋转轮电极的应用有效降低了极端热积累和局部退化。该自动化装置将接头泄漏失效率从初始的15%成功降至3%以下。最终，本研究提出了一种可扩展、符合人体工学且高生产率的制造配置，既满足严格的工业质量保证标准，又为实现全面工业自动化提供了可行路径。关键词：纵缝焊接，焊接自动化，MIG焊接，冷轧碳钢，ER34中碳钢，制造工程材料。

infographic.key_insight: 该论文表明，通过将刚性夹持、受控旋转和气动夹紧相结合，专门设计的自动纵缝焊接系统能够实现更稳定的管道连接。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这与制造自动化密切相关，因为它降低了人工波动，提升了操作人员安全性，并使圆柱形管材生产中的焊缝质量更加均匀。
method: 设计并制造了一套自动纵缝焊接装置，包含机械框架、工件夹具和可编程气动夹钳。
采用齿轮电机驱动，使管道以10–15 RPM的受控转速旋转，以形成连续焊缝焊道。
对CRCS和ER34管道的焊接性能进行了比较，并评估了电流和壁厚的影响；同时加入内部水冷CuCrZr旋转轮电极以控制热量。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告称，采用自动化系统和冷却策略后，泄漏失效率从基线系统中的15%降至3%以下。
infographic.watch_item: 该性能似乎仅在有限的材料和参数范围内得到验证，因此推广到其他管径、合金或更高吞吐量工况时，可能需要重新调整参数。

title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach
authors: Selwyn Jebadurai Devaraj, A. Arul Jeya Kumar, A Queen Alice, V Manoj Kumar, S Arokya Agustin, A Sarath Chandra
abstract: Ti-6Al-4V alloy is used a lot in aerospace, biomedical and marine applications. This study investigates the tribological behaviour of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coated and uncoated Ti-6Al-4V alloy by experimental and machine learning approaches. An Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 ceramic coating, approximately 200 µm thick, was applied to Ti-6Al-4V alloy via the detonation gun (D-gun) process under regulated conditions (oxygen flow: 4800 SLPH, acetylene: 2150 SLPH, stand-off distance: 180 mm, particle velocity ∼1200 m/s). The wear behaviour of samples was tested using a pin-on-disc apparatus in accordance with ASTM G99 standards. Tests were conducted under normal loads of 40–100 N, sliding speeds of 100–200 rpm and durations of 20–40 min against an EN31 steel counter face. Scanning electron microscopy demonstrated that coated surfaces exhibited reduced wear and formed a protective tribo-layer. Machine learning models such as artificial neural networks, K-nearest neighbours and random forest were developed to predict wear based on sliding parameters. Random forest proved to be the best choice with less mean percentage error and mean squared error. The results showed that D-gun deposited Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coatings improved the wear performance of Ti-6Al-4V.
venue: Proceedings of the Institution of Mechanical Engineers Part E Journal of Process Mechanical Engineering

infographic.key_insight: A ~200 µm Al2O3–TiO2 D-gun coating on Ti-6Al-4V significantly improves wear resistance by forming a protective tribo-layer.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This work shows that detonation-sprayed ceramic coatings can extend the service life of Ti-6Al-4V components in high-wear aerospace, biomedical, and marine applications.
method: Applied Al2O3–TiO2 coating to Ti-6Al-4V using D-gun processing (O2 4800 SLPH, acetylene 2150 SLPH, stand-off 180 mm).
Measured tribological performance with pin-on-disc testing per ASTM G99 under 40–100 N load, 100–200 rpm, and 20–40 min against EN31 steel.
Built ANN, KNN, and random forest models to predict wear from sliding parameters; random forest performed best.
infographic.evidence_signal: Experimental wear testing plus SEM inspection showed lower wear on coated samples, and the random forest model achieved the lowest mean percentage error and mean squared error.
infographic.watch_item: The machine-learning models appear to be trained on a limited experimental design, so prediction reliability may be constrained outside the tested load, speed, and time ranges.
infographic.paper_title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach

zh-Hans.title: Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun 涂层 Ti-6Al-4V 合金的摩擦学增强：一种机器学习方法
zh-Hans.abstract: Ti-6Al-4V 合金广泛用于航空航天、生物医学和海洋应用。本研究通过实验和机器学习方法，研究了 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 涂层和未涂层 Ti-6Al-4V 合金的摩擦学行为。在受控条件下（氧气流量：4800 SLPH，乙炔：2150 SLPH，喷距：180 mm，颗粒速度约 1200 m/s），采用爆轰枪（D-gun）工艺在 Ti-6Al-4V 合金上制备了厚度约 200 µm 的 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 陶瓷涂层。按照 ASTM G99 标准，使用销-盘试验装置测试样品的磨损行为。试验在 EN31 钢对偶面上进行，法向载荷为 40–100 N，滑动速度为 100–200 rpm，持续时间为 20–40 min。扫描电子显微镜表明，涂层表面磨损减少，并形成了保护性摩擦层。建立了人工神经网络、K 近邻和随机森林等机器学习模型，用于基于滑动参数预测磨损。随机森林表现最佳，平均百分比误差和均方误差更低。结果表明，D-gun 沉积的 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 涂层提高了 Ti-6Al-4V 的耐磨性能。

infographic.key_insight: Ti-6Al-4V 上约 200 µm 的 Al2O3–TiO2 D-gun 涂层通过形成保护性摩擦层，显著提高了耐磨性。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这项工作表明，爆轰喷涂陶瓷涂层可延长 Ti-6Al-4V 构件在高磨损航空航天、生物医学和海洋应用中的服役寿命。
method: 采用 D-gun 工艺在 Ti-6Al-4V 上制备 Al2O3–TiO2 涂层（O2 4800 SLPH，乙炔 2150 SLPH，喷距 180 mm）。
按照 ASTM G99，使用销-盘试验在 40–100 N 载荷、100–200 rpm 和 20–40 min 条件下，针对 EN31 钢测量摩擦学性能。
建立 ANN、KNN 和随机森林模型，基于滑动参数预测磨损；随机森林表现最佳。
infographic.evidence_signal: 实验磨损测试和 SEM 观察表明，涂层样品的磨损更低，且随机森林模型获得了最低的平均百分比误差和均方误差。
infographic.watch_item: 机器学习模型似乎基于有限的实验设计进行训练，因此在所测试的载荷、速度和时间范围之外，其预测可靠性可能受限。

title: Hot corrosion behavior of thermal sprayed using HVAF and DS techniques with Tribaloy-400 coatings for solar energy storage container
authors: P. Sakthivel, G. Sivakumar, M. Manikandan
abstract: The present study investigates the high-temperature corrosion behaviour of Tribaloy-400 (T-400) coatings deposited on ASTM A516 steel using two thermal spray techniques: (i) High Velocity Air Fuel (HVAF) spraying and (ii) Detonation Spraying (DS). The coated specimens were exposed to a molten solar salt environment consisting of 60% NaNO 3 –40% KNO 3 at 500 °C for exposure durations up to 1000 hours to evaluate their oxidation and corrosion resistance. Phase analysis indicated the formation of stable protective oxide phases, including Cr 2 O 3 , Co 3 O 4 , and CoMoO 4 , in both coating systems. Elemental mapping revealed that the HVAF coating retained a uniform Cr–Mo–Si–O enriched surface with minimal molten salt penetration even after prolonged exposure of 1000 hours. In contrast, the DS coating exhibited comparatively deeper salt ingress into the coating microstructure, which contributed to increased degradation and spallation. SEM observations showed that the HVAF coatings possessed a dense and well-bonded microstructure, along with the formation of thermodynamically stable oxides such as Cr 2 O 3 , CoCr 2 O 4 , and CoMoO 4 , resulting in superior resistance to molten salt-induced corrosion. However, the relatively porous nature of the DS coating promoted salt-assisted oxide dissolution, leading to higher mass gain, increased spallation, and accelerated degradation during extended exposure. Comparative evaluation of both coating techniques was carried out to identify a suitable coating process and feedstock combination for high-temperature CSP applications.
venue: Journal of Materials Research and Technology

infographic.key_insight: HVAF-sprayed Tribaloy-400 formed a denser, more protective oxide layer than DS, giving markedly better resistance to molten solar-salt corrosion at 500 °C.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For concentrated solar power thermal-storage containers, HVAF appears to be the more reliable coating route for extending high-temperature service life in nitrate-salt environments.
method: Tribaloy-400 coatings were deposited on ASTM A516 steel by HVAF and detonation spraying.
Specimens were exposed to 60% NaNO3–40% KNO3 molten salt at 500 °C for up to 1000 h.
Microstructure, phase formation, elemental mapping, mass gain, and spallation were compared.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports that HVAF retained a uniform Cr–Mo–Si–O-rich surface with minimal salt penetration, while DS showed deeper ingress, higher mass gain, and more spallation after long exposure.
infographic.watch_item: The comparison is based on a specific salt composition and temperature, so performance should be revalidated for other CSP operating conditions and thermal cycling histories.
infographic.paper_title: Hot corrosion behavior of thermal sprayed using HVAF and DS techniques with Tribaloy-400 coatings for solar energy storage container

zh-Hans.title: 采用HVAF和DS技术制备的Tribaloy-400涂层在太阳能储能容器中的热腐蚀行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究考察了采用两种热喷涂技术——(i) 高速空气燃料喷涂（HVAF）和 (ii) 爆炸喷涂（DS）——沉积于 ASTM A516 钢上的 Tribaloy-400（T-400）涂层的高温腐蚀行为。将涂覆试样暴露于由 60% NaNO3–40% KNO3 组成的熔融太阳盐环境中，在 500 °C 下暴露最长达 1000 小时，以评估其抗氧化和耐腐蚀性能。相分析表明，两种涂层体系中均形成了稳定的保护性氧化物相，包括 Cr2O3、Co3O4 和 CoMoO4。元素映射显示，即使在持续暴露 1000 小时后，HVAF 涂层仍保持均匀的 Cr–Mo–Si–O 富集表面，且熔盐渗透最小。相比之下，DS 涂层表现出更深的盐侵入涂层微观结构，这促进了更严重的劣化和剥落。SEM 观察表明，HVAF 涂层具有致密且结合良好的微观结构，并形成了热力学稳定的氧化物，如 Cr2O3、CoCr2O4 和 CoMoO4，从而对熔盐诱导的腐蚀表现出更优异的耐受性。然而，DS 涂层相对多孔的特性促进了盐辅助的氧化物溶解，导致质量增重更高、剥落更严重，并在长时间暴露过程中加速劣化。对两种涂层技术进行了对比评估，以确定适用于高温 CSP 应用的合适涂层工艺与供料组合。

infographic.key_insight: HVAF 喷涂的 Tribaloy-400 形成了比 DS 更致密、保护性更强的氧化层，因此在 500 °C 下对熔融太阳盐腐蚀表现出明显更好的耐受性。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于聚光太阳能热储能容器，HVAF 似乎是更可靠的涂层路线，可在硝酸盐环境中延长高温服役寿命。
method: 采用 HVAF 和爆炸喷涂在 ASTM A516 钢上沉积 Tribaloy-400 涂层。
试样在 500 °C 下暴露于 60% NaNO3–40% KNO3 熔融盐中，最长达 1000 h。
对微观结构、相形成、元素映射、质量增重和剥落进行了比较。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告称，HVAF 在长时间暴露后仍保持均匀的 Cr–Mo–Si–O 富集表面且盐渗透极小，而 DS 则表现出更深的侵入、更高的质量增重和更严重的剥落。
infographic.watch_item: 该比较基于特定的盐组成和温度，因此在其他 CSP 运行条件和热循环历史下，应重新验证其性能。

title: Effect of Barrel Filling Ratio on the Microstructure, Phase Composition and Tribological Performance of Detonation-Sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr Coatings
authors: Zhuldyz Sagdoldina, Aiym Nabioldina, Daryn Baizhan, Nurbol Berdimuratov, Gulsym Bektasova
abstract: This study investigates the influence of barrel filling ratio on the microstructure, phase composition, and tribological performance of detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings. Coatings were deposited at barrel filling ratios of 43% and 53% under identical spraying conditions. Microstructural characterization revealed the formation of dense lamellar coatings with low porosity and uniform distribution of Cr3C2 carbide particles within the NiCr metallic matrix. Compared with the coating deposited at a barrel filling ratio of 43%, the coating deposited at 53% exhibited a denser microstructure. X-ray diffraction analysis confirmed that Cr3C2 and NiCr remained the dominant phases after spraying, while a minor amount of Cr7C3 formed due to partial decarburization of chromium carbide during thermal exposure. Tribological performance was evaluated under dry sliding conditions using a ball-on-disc configuration at normal loads of 10 and 15 N and sliding speeds of 5 and 10 cm/s. Wear volume was determined from the geometry of the wear track after testing, and wear rate was calculated accordingly. The coating produced at a barrel filling ratio of 53% demonstrated improved wear resistance under elevated loads despite exhibiting a higher coefficient of friction. The minimum wear rate reached 1.23 × 10−4 mm3/(m·N), which was associated with reduced porosity and enhanced structural integrity of the coating. The obtained results demonstrate that optimization of detonation spraying parameters significantly affects coating structure and tribological behavior. The developed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings are promising protective materials for components operating under severe friction and wear conditions, including industrial and high-temperature engineering applications.

infographic.key_insight: Increasing the barrel filling ratio from 43% to 53% made detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings denser and more wear-resistant, though with a slightly higher friction coefficient.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Optimizing spraying fill ratio is a practical lever for improving protective coating durability in high-friction and high-temperature machine components.
method: Detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings at 43% and 53% barrel filling ratios under the same spray conditions.
Compared microstructure and phase composition using microscopy and X-ray diffraction.
Evaluated dry sliding wear in ball-on-disc tests at 10 and 15 N and 5 and 10 cm/s.
infographic.evidence_signal: The 53% coating achieved the lowest reported wear rate, 1.23 × 10^-4 mm3/(m·N), and showed denser structure with low porosity.
infographic.watch_item: Results are based on a narrow set of spray ratios and dry sliding conditions, so broader operating environments may change the friction–wear tradeoff.
infographic.paper_title: Effect of Barrel Filling Ratio on the Microstructure, Phase Composition and Tribological Performance of Detonation-Sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr Coatings

zh-Hans.title: 爆炸喷涂 Cr3C2–NiCr 涂层微观结构、相组成及摩擦学性能对炮筒填充比的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究探讨了炮筒填充比对爆炸喷涂 Cr3C2–NiCr 涂层微观结构、相组成和摩擦学性能的影响。在相同喷涂条件下，分别以 43% 和 53% 的炮筒填充比制备涂层。微观结构表征显示，涂层形成了致密的层片状结构，孔隙率低，Cr3C2 碳化物颗粒在 NiCr 金属基体中分布均匀。与炮筒填充比为 43% 的涂层相比，53% 条件下制备的涂层微观结构更致密。X 射线衍射分析证实，喷涂后 Cr3C2 和 NiCr 仍为主导相，同时由于热暴露过程中铬碳化物发生部分脱碳，形成了少量 Cr7C3。摩擦学性能在干滑动条件下采用球-盘配置进行评估，法向载荷为 10 和 15 N，滑动速度为 5 和 10 cm/s。磨损体积根据测试后磨痕的几何形貌确定，并据此计算磨损率。炮筒填充比为 53% 的涂层在较高载荷下表现出更优的耐磨性，尽管其摩擦系数更高。最小磨损率达到 1.23 × 10−4 mm3/(m·N)，这与孔隙率降低和涂层结构完整性增强有关。结果表明，爆炸喷涂参数的优化会显著影响涂层结构及其摩擦学行为。所制备的 Cr3C2–NiCr 涂层有望作为在严苛摩擦和磨损条件下服役部件的防护材料，包括工业和高温工程应用。

infographic.key_insight: 将炮筒填充比从 43% 提高到 53%，使爆炸喷涂 Cr3C2–NiCr 涂层更致密、耐磨性更好，但摩擦系数略有升高。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 优化喷涂填充比是提高高摩擦和高温机械部件防护涂层耐久性的一个实用手段。
method: 在相同喷涂条件下，制备炮筒填充比为 43% 和 53% 的爆炸喷涂 Cr3C2–NiCr 涂层。
采用显微镜和 X 射线衍射对微观结构和相组成进行比较。
在 10 和 15 N 载荷以及 5 和 10 cm/s 速度下，通过球-盘试验评估干滑动磨损。
infographic.evidence_signal: 53% 涂层获得了最低报告磨损率 1.23 × 10^-4 mm3/(m·N)，并表现出低孔隙率的更致密结构。
infographic.watch_item: 结果基于较窄范围的喷涂比和干滑动条件，因此更广泛的服役环境可能会改变摩擦—磨损权衡。

title: Optimising Cold Spray Additive Manufacturing: Pressure-driven enhancement of mechanical performance in copper deposits
authors: Steven Camilleri, Thi Thuy Tien Tran, Keita Nomoto, Andrew Duguid, Matthew Harbidge, Riyan Rashid
abstract: Cold spray additive manufacturing (CSAM) is a solid-state process capable of producing dense metallic components without melting, making it highly attractive for copper applications requiring both electrical conductivity and mechanical integrity. In this study, the influence of spray pressure at 30 bar, 40 bar, 50 bar and 60 bar on particle velocity, microstructure, and properties of cold-sprayed copper was systematically investigated using a LightSPEE3D system. The cold spray deposits were characterised by X-ray diffraction (XRD), hardness testing, eddy current conductivity, tensile evaluation, and scanning electron microscopy (SEM). The results reveal that increasing spray pressure enhances particle velocities beyond the critical threshold for copper, leading to improved inter-particle bonding and microstructural refinement consistent with severe plastic deformation and possible continuous dynamic recrystallisation (cDRX)-assisted mechanisms. XRD analysis suggested progressive crystallite refinement and increased dislocation density with pressure, which directly correlated with improved ductility. While hardness decreased due to recovery and recrystallisation, electrical conductivity increased, likely due to improved inter-particle continuity and reduced interfacial discontinuities. Tensile testing showed a clear strength-ductility transition, with deposits at higher pressures exhibiting substantially improved ductility approaching bulk copper behaviour and fully ductile fracture morphologies. Overall, the findings identify an optimum processing window at higher spray pressures, where copper cold spray deposits achieve a balanced combination of conductivity, ductility, and strength. This study highlights the critical role of spray pressure in controlling the interplay between particle velocity, dynamic recrystallisation, and multifunctional performance in CSAM copper components. This study establishes a process-structure-property relationship linking particle velocity, XRD-derived microstructural evolution, conductivity, and tensile behaviour within a LightSPEE3D CSAM system.

infographic.key_insight: Raising cold-spray pressure from 30 to 60 bar boosts copper particle velocity past the bonding threshold, producing denser deposits with better conductivity and much higher ductility.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This defines a practical process window for CSAM copper parts where mechanical integrity and electrical performance can be balanced for functional manufacturing.
method: LightSPEE3D cold spray copper deposits were produced at 30, 40, 50, and 60 bar.
Microstructure and phase-state trends were assessed by XRD and SEM.
Performance was measured using hardness, eddy-current conductivity, and tensile testing.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports a clear pressure-dependent trend: higher pressure increased crystallite refinement, improved inter-particle bonding and conductivity, and shifted tensile behavior toward ductile fracture.
infographic.watch_item: Higher pressure improved ductility but reduced hardness, so the best setting depends on whether the priority is conductivity/ductility or surface wear resistance.
infographic.paper_title: Optimising Cold Spray Additive Manufacturing: Pressure-driven enhancement of mechanical performance in copper deposits

zh-Hans.title: 优化冷喷涂增材制造：压力驱动提升铜沉积层机械性能
zh-Hans.abstract: 冷喷涂增材制造（CSAM）是一种固态工艺，能够在不发生熔化的情况下制备致密金属部件，因此对于既要求电导率又要求机械完整性的铜应用极具吸引力。本研究采用 LightSPEE3D 系统，系统考察了 30 bar、40 bar、50 bar 和 60 bar 喷涂压力对冷喷涂铜颗粒速度、显微组织和性能的影响。通过 X 射线衍射（XRD）、硬度测试、涡流电导率测量、拉伸测试和扫描电子显微镜（SEM）对冷喷涂沉积层进行了表征。结果表明，随着喷涂压力升高，颗粒速度超过铜的临界阈值，从而增强了颗粒间结合，并促进了与严重塑性变形及可能的连续动态再结晶（cDRX）辅助机制一致的显微组织细化。XRD 分析表明，随着压力升高，晶粒尺寸持续细化、位错密度增加，这与延展性的提升直接相关。尽管由于回复和再结晶导致硬度下降，但电导率却提高了，这可能归因于颗粒间连续性改善以及界面不连续性减少。拉伸测试显示出清晰的强度—延性转变，高压力下的沉积层表现出显著改善的延性，接近块体铜的行为，并呈现完全延性的断裂形貌。总体而言，研究结果确定了一个较高喷涂压力下的最佳工艺窗口，在该窗口内铜冷喷涂沉积层可实现电导率、延性和强度的平衡组合。本研究强调了喷涂压力在调控 CSAM 铜部件中颗粒速度、动态再结晶与多功能性能相互作用方面的关键作用。本研究建立了一个工艺—结构—性能关系，将 LightSPEE3D CSAM 系统中的颗粒速度、基于 XRD 的显微组织演化、电导率和拉伸行为联系起来。

infographic.key_insight: 将冷喷涂压力从 30 提高到 60 bar 可使铜颗粒速度超过结合阈值，形成更致密、导电性更好且延性显著更高的沉积层。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为 CSAM 铜部件定义了一个可行的工艺窗口，使机械完整性与电性能能够在功能制造中实现平衡。
method: 采用 LightSPEE3D 冷喷涂工艺在 30、40、50 和 60 bar 下制备铜沉积层。
通过 XRD 和 SEM 评估显微组织及相态演变趋势。
使用硬度、涡流电导率和拉伸测试测量性能。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了明显的压力依赖趋势：更高压力提高了晶粒细化程度，改善了颗粒间结合和电导率，并使拉伸行为转向延性断裂。
infographic.watch_item: 更高压力提高了延性但降低了硬度，因此最佳设定取决于优先目标是电导率/延性还是表面耐磨性。

title: EFFECT OF ARGON FLOW RATE DURING AIR PLASMA SPRAYING ON THE STRUCTURE AND PROPERTIES OF NICRFEBSIC COATINGS
authors: Dastan Buitkenov, Nurkhat Bimakhan, Nurmakhanbet Raisov
abstract: In this work, self-fluxing metal-ceramic coatings based on the NiCrFeBSiC system were obtained by air plasma spraying, and their structural, mechanical, and tribological properties were investigated.. The effect of argon flow rate (1600 and 1800 L/h) during coating formation was consideredIt was found that an increase in argon flow rate leads to an approximately twofold increase in coating thickness and a twofold decrease in porosity. According to the microhardness measurement results, the microhardness was 1015.8 ± 81.5 HV, while the elastic modulus was 203.9 ± 5.4 GPa. Tribological tests were carried out using the ball-on-disk configurationAt an argon flow rate of 1800 L/h, the friction coefficient showed a lower value (≈0.107), indicating improved wear resistance of the coatings. Scratch test results showed a high level of adhesion between the coatings and the substrate. Although the critical load values (Lc) were similar for both regimes, the coatings obtained at 1800 L/h exhibited a more gradual and stable failure behavior.
venue: Journal of Surface Engineering and Coating Technology

infographic.key_insight: Increasing argon flow rate from 1600 to 1800 L/h during air plasma spraying produced thicker, denser NiCrFeBSiC coatings with better tribological performance.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Optimizing plasma-gas flow can directly improve coating quality, wear resistance, and service life for self-fluxing thermal-sprayed surface protection.
method: Air plasma sprayed NiCrFeBSiC self-fluxing metal-ceramic coatings
Compared argon flow rates of 1600 and 1800 L/h
Evaluated thickness, porosity, microhardness, elastic modulus, friction, and scratch adhesion
infographic.evidence_signal: At 1800 L/h, coating thickness increased by about 2×, porosity decreased by about 2×, and the friction coefficient dropped to approximately 0.107 with stable scratch failure behavior.
infographic.watch_item: The study compares only two argon flow settings, so broader process optimization would need more gas-flow levels and additional durability testing.
infographic.paper_title: EFFECT OF ARGON FLOW RATE DURING AIR PLASMA SPRAYING ON THE STRUCTURE AND PROPERTIES OF NICRFEBSIC COATINGS

zh-Hans.title: 空气等离子喷涂过程中氩气流量对NiCrFeBSiC涂层结构和性能的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究采用空气等离子喷涂制备了基于NiCrFeBSiC体系的自熔性金属-陶瓷涂层，并对其结构、力学和摩擦学性能进行了研究。考察了涂层形成过程中氩气流量（1600和1800 L/h）的影响。结果表明，氩气流量的增加会使涂层厚度约增加一倍，而孔隙率降低一半。根据显微硬度测试结果，显微硬度为1015.8 ± 81.5 HV，弹性模量为203.9 ± 5.4 GPa。采用球-盘摩擦配置进行了摩擦学测试。在氩气流量为1800 L/h时，摩擦系数较低（≈0.107），表明涂层的耐磨性有所提高。划痕测试结果表明涂层与基体之间具有较高的结合强度。尽管两种工况下的临界载荷值（Lc）相近，但在1800 L/h条件下获得的涂层表现出更为渐进且稳定的失效行为。

infographic.key_insight: 将空气等离子喷涂中的氩气流量从1600提高到1800 L/h，可制备出更厚、更致密且摩擦学性能更好的NiCrFeBSiC涂层。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 优化等离子气体流量可直接提升自熔性热喷涂表面防护层的涂层质量、耐磨性和使用寿命。
method: 空气等离子喷涂制备NiCrFeBSiC自熔性金属-陶瓷涂层
比较氩气流量为1600和1800 L/h的工艺条件
评估厚度、孔隙率、显微硬度、弹性模量、摩擦性能和划痕附着力
infographic.evidence_signal: 在1800 L/h条件下，涂层厚度约增加2倍，孔隙率约降低2倍，摩擦系数降至约0.107，且划痕失效行为更稳定。
infographic.watch_item: 该研究仅比较了两种氩气流量设置，因此更广泛的工艺优化还需要更多气体流量水平和额外的耐久性测试。

title: A Comparative Analysis of Multitask Neural Networks and Stacking Ensemble Learning for Predicting UTS, Weld Hardness, and HAZ Hardness in Welding Applications
authors: Sama Mukhtar, Amit Sata, Gaurang Joshi, Durgesh Srivastava
abstract: Accurately predicting welding performance measures like ultimate strength (UTS), weld bead hardness, and HAZ mechanical hardness is crucial for ensuring the structural integrity and performance of welded components. Multitask learning (MTL) refers to a machine learning approach in which one model is designed to handle several interconnected tasks at the same time. Instead of training separate models for each task, MTL shares representations among tasks, allowing them to leverage common patterns while maintaining task-specific distinctions. In this study, we compared two advanced machine learning techniques, namely multitask neural network (MTNN) and stacking ensemble learning, for predicting these parameters based on a shared dataset. A multitask neural network (MTNN) is a specific type of multitask learning (MTL) model that uses a deep neural network architecture to handle multiple related tasks simultaneously. In MTNN, different tasks share some hidden layers while having task-specific output layers. This shared representation allows the model to learn common patterns across tasks while maintaining task-specific outputs. Both methods are evaluated using RMSE and R<sup>2</sup> to determine their predictive accuracy and overall effectiveness. It showed robust prediction strength, as its RMSE outcomes are 0.1288 for UTS, 0.0886 for weld hardness, and 0.1125 for HAZ hardness, whereas R<sup>2</sup> values are 0.6724, 0.9215, and 0.8407, respectively. This underlines that it can generalize well in interrelated tasks. Stacking ensemble learning outperformed MTL in the accuracy of individual tasks: the RMSE for UTS is 0.0263 and R<sup>2</sup> is 0.9863; for weld hardness, it is 0.0467 and 0.9782; and for HAZ hardness, it is 0.1109 and 0.8453. Such results indicate the good ability of ensemble methods to produce highly accurate, task-specific predictions. This comparison reveals the trade-offs between the two approaches. MTL is good in scenarios where the tasks are related and the data are sparse, giving efficient training and good generalization; stacking ensembles work better in the case of accurate, independent predictions. In both cases, they show remarkable potential for improving the predictive power of welding applications, making them suitable precursors to further investigation into hybrid models that bring the best features of both approaches together.

infographic.key_insight: A stacking ensemble predicts welding quality metrics more accurately than a multitask neural network, while multitask learning still offers strong shared-task generalization.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study helps select data-driven models for estimating UTS, weld hardness, and HAZ hardness to improve weld design, quality control, and process optimization.
method: Compared multitask neural network (shared hidden layers, task-specific outputs) with stacking ensemble learning.
Predicted three welding responses from a shared dataset: UTS, weld bead hardness, and HAZ hardness.
Evaluated performance using RMSE and R² across all tasks.
infographic.evidence_signal: Stacking ensemble achieved lower RMSE and higher R² for all three outputs, while MTNN showed solid but weaker performance, especially for UTS.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on dataset size and feature quality, so ensemble gains may not transfer if welding conditions change or data are sparse/noisy.

zh-Hans.title: 多任务神经网络与堆叠集成学习在焊接应用中预测UTS、焊缝硬度和HAZ硬度的比较分析
zh-Hans.abstract: 准确预测焊接性能指标，如极限强度（UTS）、焊缝硬度和HAZ机械硬度，对于确保焊接构件的结构完整性和性能至关重要。多任务学习（MTL）是一种机器学习方法，其中一个模型被设计用于同时处理多个相互关联的任务。与为每个任务分别训练独立模型不同，MTL在任务之间共享表示，使其能够利用共同模式，同时保留任务特异性差异。在本研究中，我们基于共享数据集，对两种先进的机器学习技术，即多任务神经网络（MTNN）和堆叠集成学习，进行了比较，用于预测这些参数。多任务神经网络（MTNN）是多任务学习（MTL）的一种特定类型，它采用深度神经网络架构同时处理多个相关任务。在MTNN中，不同任务共享部分隐藏层，同时具有任务特定的输出层。这种共享表示使模型能够学习跨任务的共同模式，同时保持任务特定输出。两种方法均使用RMSE和R²进行评估，以确定其预测精度和整体有效性。结果表明，其预测能力较强，RMSE分别为UTS的0.1288、焊缝硬度的0.0886以及HAZ硬度的0.1125，而R²值分别为0.6724、0.9215和0.8407。这表明其在相互关联任务中具有良好的泛化能力。堆叠集成学习在单个任务的精度上优于MTL：UTS的RMSE为0.0263，R²为0.9863；焊缝硬度的RMSE为0.0467，R²为0.9782；HAZ硬度的RMSE为0.1109，R²为0.8453。这些结果表明，集成方法在生成高精度、任务特定预测方面具有良好能力。该比较揭示了两种方法之间的权衡。MTL适用于任务相关且数据稀疏的场景，能够实现高效训练和良好泛化；而堆叠集成更适合需要高精度、独立预测的情况。总体而言，两者都显示出提升焊接应用预测能力的显著潜力，使其可作为进一步研究混合模型的合适前提，以结合两种方法的最佳特征。

infographic.key_insight: 与多任务神经网络相比，堆叠集成对焊接质量指标的预测更准确，而多任务学习仍然具有较强的跨任务共享泛化能力。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究有助于选择数据驱动模型来估计UTS、焊缝硬度和HAZ硬度，从而改进焊接设计、质量控制和工艺优化。
method: 比较了多任务神经网络（共享隐藏层、任务特定输出）与堆叠集成学习。
基于共享数据集预测了三个焊接响应：UTS、焊缝硬度和HAZ硬度。
使用RMSE和R²对所有任务进行性能评估。
infographic.evidence_signal: 堆叠集成在三个输出上均取得了更低的RMSE和更高的R²，而MTNN表现稳健但略弱，尤其是在UTS上。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能取决于数据集规模和特征质量，因此如果焊接条件变化或数据稀疏/噪声较大，集成方法的优势可能不会转移。
